_comment: Maps project states to suggested next actions.

MICRO_IDEA.label: Render 30s Preview
MICRO_IDEA.desc: Create a short preview to remember this idea.

IDEA.label: Set BPM & Key
IDEA.desc: Organize this idea by adding key metadata.

WIP.label: Render Full Preview
WIP.desc: Export a full arrangement to listen outside FL.

PREVIEW_READY.label: Export Stems
PREVIEW_READY.desc: Prepare stems for mixing or collaboration.

BROKEN_OR_EMPTY.label: Check Folder
BROKEN_OR_EMPTY.desc: Investigate why this project is empty or broken.
